title: Sherwin-Williams Company Stock: Is Now The Time To Buy?
text: Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) shares have been in a downtrend for over a year but that may be coming to an end. While the near-term outlook suggests that more downside could be coming, the long-term chart of weekly price action suggests the market is near the bottom.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For February 2023
text: NOBL fell 4.12% in December, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 6.5%. Thus far this month, through January 25th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 1.92% and starting the year on a bright note.

title: Sherwin-Williams Shares Sink on Q4 Results and Outlook
text: Shares of paint manufacturer Sherwin-Williams declined after the company expressed uncertainties about the housing market and other demand conditions.

title: Sherwin-Williams issues big profit and sales warnings, will ‘prepare for the worst' in 2023
text: Shares of Sherwin-Williams Co. tumbled Thursday, after the paint and coatings maker warned of a big 2023 profit and sales miss, as demand is expected to weaken as the housing market remains pressured and the U.S. industrial sector slows.

title: 2 Stocks Pointing to a Tough 2023 Ahead
text: Pockets of weakness still exist even as the year has started out well for the stock market.

title: Why Sherwin-Williams Stock Is Down Today
text: The company sees significant headwinds in 2023.

title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Tops Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.72% and 0.27%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Sherwin-Williams Drops on Disappointing Outlook
text: The company posted fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.89 per share, while analysts expected $1.86.

title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Healthy demand in domestic markets and aggressive cost control are expected to have aided Sherwin-Williams' (SHW) Q4 performance amid headwinds from high raw material and labor costs.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold Onto Sherwin-Williams for Now
text: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) gains on favorable demand in North America and its pricing and expansion actions amid challenges from higher raw material costs and demand slowdown in Europe and China.

title: Dividend Growth Stock Watchlist - January 2023

title: 3 Soon-To-Be Dividend Kings

title: Sherwin-Williams: Consistent Growth And Profitability But Too Pricey
text: The Sherwin-Williams Company has an experienced management team which has established a strong track record of growth and profitability. Future growth should continue, powered by investments in new store openings, innovative products, e-commerce, and productivity-enhancing services.
